subcodes.title: Asl-i-Kullu'l-Khayr (Words of Wisdom)
subcodes.first_line: The source of all good is trust in God, submission unto His command, and contentment with His holy will and pleasure.
subcodes.first_line_orig: اصل کل الخیر هو الاعتماد علی الله و الانقیاد لامره و الرضاء لمرضاته اصل الحب
subcodes.subjects: @walking the spiritual path; spiritual wayfaring; the virtuous life, @detachment; severance; renunciation; patience, @trust and reliance in God; turning to Him at all times, @love of God, @fairmindedness; personal justice [insaf], @independent investigation of truth; reality, @exhortations and counsels, @thankfulness; gratitude, @words vs deeds, @humility; meekness; lowliness
